name: Mexicali Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 can VEG-ALL Mixed Vegetables, drained (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tortillas on a lightly greased baking sheet.
Sprinkle one tortilla with 1/2 cup cheese; top with half of the VEG-ALL, tomato, onion, pepper, and chilis.
2. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup cheese and top with half of the olives.
3. Repeat procedure with second tortilla.
4. Bake at 425°F for approximately 10-12 minutes, until cheese is melted and tortillas are crisp.
